## Fast CI Results
The `make fast-ci` command failed with exit code 2. Here's a summary of all results:
**Passing Checks:** - AGENTS.md standard: PASSED - CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md pairing: PASSED (19 files checked, 0 violations) - Lint: PASSED (all checks passed) - Format Check: PASSED (1745 files already formatted) - Prettier Check: PASSED (all files use correct style) - Markdown Check: PASSED - Type checking (ty): PASSED (all checks passed) - Unit Tests (erk-dev): PASSED (138 passed) - Unit Tests (erk-statusline): PASSED (123 passed) - Unit Tests (erk-mcp): PASSED (50 passed)
**Failures:**
1. **Exec Reference Check: FAILED** - File `.claude/skills/erk-exec/reference.md` is out of date - Regenerate with: `erk-dev gen-exec-reference-docs`
2. **Unit Tests (erk): 2 ERRORS + 5858 PASSED** - Import errors in two test modules: - `/tests/unit/erk_shared/test_worktree_cleanup.py` - cannot import `PlanInfo` from `erk_shared.pr_store.types` - `/tests/unit/erk_slots/test_unassign_cmd.py` - cannot import `PlanInfo` from `erk_shared.pr_store.types`
The root issue is that `PlanInfo` is being imported by test files but doesn't exist in `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/pr_store/types.py`.
